name: Pinterest
description: Pinterest is a visual discovery and bookmarking platform where users save and organize ideas as pins on boards. The API allows agents to create and manage pins and boards, retrieve user account data, and access analytics for content performance.

capabilities.name: create_pin
capabilities.description: Create a new pin on a specified board with an image URL, title, description, and optional destination link.

capabilities.name: get_pin
capabilities.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific pin including its image, description, board, and engagement metrics.

capabilities.name: list_boards
capabilities.description: Fetch a paginated list of boards owned by the authenticated user, including board name, description, and pin count.

capabilities.name: create_board
capabilities.description: Create a new board for the authenticated user with a name, description, and privacy setting.

capabilities.name: list_board_pins
capabilities.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all pins saved to a specific board.

capabilities.name: get_user_account
capabilities.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's Pinterest profile including username, bio, follower count, and website URL.

capabilities.name: search_pins
capabilities.description: Search for pins matching a query string, with optional filters for media type and sorting.
